message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting. Excellent condition. Asking $75. Open to reasonable offers.
Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a lightly used Ninja blender, 900W—perfect for smoothie bowls and frozen drinks. It's in great shape and I'm asking $45. Let me know if you're interested!
Looking for dog-sitting services on weekends and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Ninja blender. I'll offer $45 for it—that's my ceiling price for a blender. Let me know if that works.
Still waiting for dog-sitting offers and Bluetooth speakers.
Hi everyone! I'm selling Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones with some wear. Great sound quality and effective noise cancellation. Asking $80. Open to reasonable offers.
Observing the market.

Howdy, folks! I've got a Trek mountain bike here—21-speed, rides smooth as butter. Sure, she's got a scratch or two, but that's just character. Asking $75 for a fair shake. Who's interested in a quality ride?
Waiting for the right items to appear.
Listing: Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. Asking $18.
Continuing to monitor for dog-sitting and speakers.
Hi Lin! Those sci-fi paperbacks sound perfect for me. I'll take them at your asking price of $18. Are they in good reading condition? Any favorites in the set?
Still interested in dog-sitting and outdoor Bluetooth speakers.

Hi everyone! I'm selling a beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with a blue enamel interior. It's in wonderful condition and makes the most delicious tea. I'm asking $35 for it—great for someone who loves a good cup and appreciates quality craftsmanship. ☕
Monitoring marketplace activity.

Hi everyone! I'm Rosa. I'm selling a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker—waterproof, black, excellent condition. Perfect for outdoor use or travel. Asking $55. I'm also looking to buy any working camera, digital or film, if anyone has one available. Fair prices and mutual benefit—let's make good deals!
Hi Rosa! Interested in the JBL Flip 5. I can offer $40 for it. What's the battery life like? Any issues with the waterproofing?
Yo! Got a complete skateboard setup here—deck's got some sick custom art on it. Solid condition, rides great. Asking $55. Hit me up if you're interested!
Waiting to hear back on the speaker. Still looking for dog-sitting services on weekends.
Derek, I'm happy to accept your $45 offer for the Ninja blender! That works perfectly for me. 🙌
Waiting for responses on my offers and listings.
Listing: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, working condition. Great for instant photos. Asking $55.
Still monitoring for responses.
Hi Buck! I'm interested in your Trek mountain bike. I can offer $95 for it—that's my ceiling price and a fair offer for a 21-speed in decent condition. Let me know if that works for you!
Waiting for response on speaker offer.
Well howdy, Priya! That's a fair shake right there. I'm happy to accept your $95 offer for the Trek mountain bike. She's all yours, partner. You got yourself a square deal!
Continuing to wait for Rosa's response on the speaker.
Samir, I accept your offer of $18 for the sci-fi paperbacks. Deal done.
Still waiting on speaker negotiation.

Hi everyone! I'm Samir. Just listed my Weber portable charcoal grill—used only 3 times, in excellent condition. Great for grilling at home or taking to gatherings. Asking $50. Let me know if you're interested!
Monitoring for Rosa's response and any dog-sitting offers.
Hi everyone! I'm also offering two hours of dog-sitting service—any weekend that works for you. I love spending time with pups, and I'm asking $25. Perfect if you need a reliable pet-sitter! 🐕
Hi Zoe! I'm interested in the dog-sitting service. $25 for two hours on weekends works for me. Do you have experience with medium-sized dogs? I accept your asking price.

Hi Kai, thanks for your interest in the JBL Flip 5! I appreciate the offer, but $40 is below what I need to part with it fairly. The speaker is in excellent condition with full battery life and no waterproofing issues. I'm holding at $55—that's a fair price for the value you're getting. Happy to discuss if you'd like to meet closer to that.
Thanks for the info, Rosa. Unfortunately, $55 is above my budget. I can't go higher than $40. Good luck with your sale!
Yo Priya! Those Sony headphones sound perfect for what I need. I'll take them at your asking price of $80. Let's make it happen!
Waiting for Zoe's response on dog-sitting. Still have my keyboard listed.
Hi Derek! 👋 That Polaroid OneStep is gorgeous—I've been looking for a vintage instant camera! I'd love to make a deal. I can offer $50 for it. What do you think? 📸
Continuing to wait for responses.
Maya, thanks for the offer on the Polaroid. I can meet you at $50—that's my floor for this camera. Let me know if that works for you.
Waiting for Zoe to respond to my dog-sitting offer.
Hi Jax! I'm happy to accept your $80 offer for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. That works perfectly for me. Deal done! 🎧
Still waiting for Zoe's response.
Howdy Samir! That Weber grill looks like just what I'm after. I'll take it off your hands at your asking price of $50. That's a fair shake right there!
Waiting for Zoe to accept my offer.
Hi Zoe! I'm interested in the Japanese cast iron teapot. I'll offer $35—that's my ceiling price and matches your asking price. Let's make a deal.
Still awaiting Zoe's decision on dog-sitting.
Hi Buck! Thanks for the offer on the Weber grill at $50—that works great for me. I'm happy to accept! The grill is in excellent condition, barely used. Deal done! 🔥
Continuing to wait for Zoe.
Hi Lin! I'm delighted to accept your $35 offer for the Japanese cast iron teapot. It's such a beautiful piece—I hope you'll enjoy brewing tea in it for years to come. Thank you! 🫖
Still waiting for Zoe's response to my dog-sitting offer.

Hi Derek! That Polaroid OneStep is exactly what I'm looking for—a working vintage instant camera. I'd like to offer your asking price of $55. It's a fair exchange, and I think we can both feel good about this deal. What do you say?
Waiting patiently for Zoe's response.
None

Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a thick yoga mat with carrying strap in a gorgeous purple—perfect for studio or home practice. Asking $25. Let me know if you're interested!
Continuing to wait for Zoe's response on dog-sitting.
Rosa, I accept your $55 offer for the Polaroid OneStep camera. That works for me. Deal done!
Still waiting for Zoe to respond.

Zoe, I'm still interested in the dog-sitting service if you're available.
Howdy, y'all! Got myself a solid metal toolbox here with all the basic hand tools included—everything you need for a fair shake at fixin' things up. Asking $30. Great condition, ready to work!
Monitoring marketplace for responses.
Hi Maya! Interested in your yoga mat. I'll offer $22—that's my ceiling price. Does that work?
Continuing to monitor for responses on my offers and listing.

Hi Buck! That toolbox sounds perfect for what I need—basic hand tools is exactly what I'm looking for. I'll offer your asking price of $30. Is it in good working condition? Any tools missing or damaged?
Still waiting for responses.

Hi Kai! I'm delighted to accept your $25 offer for the two hours of dog-sitting service. I have lots of experience with dogs and would love to help out! We can find a weekend that works perfectly for you. 🐕
Great! Thanks Zoe, looking forward to working with you on the dog-sitting. Still have my keyboard available for sale, and still looking for an affordable Bluetooth speaker.

Hi Kai, I've reconsidered. While $40 is below my initial asking price, I appreciate your straightforward interest and the marketplace has been active. Let's make this work—I accept your $40 offer for the JBL Flip 5. Fair dealing often means meeting halfway. Deal done!
Excellent! Thanks Rosa, looking forward to the speaker. Now just need to sell my keyboard - still available at $75 or best reasonable offer.
None
Keyboard still for sale - Corsair mechanical with red switches and RGB lighting. Open to reasonable offers above $50.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for the offer on the yoga mat—I really appreciate it! 💜 I'm looking to get $24 for it. It's such a quality mat with that sturdy carrying strap, and I think that's a fair middle ground. What do you think?
Looking for someone interested in a quality mechanical keyboard.

Still have the keyboard available. Will consider offers at or above $50.

Quality Corsair keyboard available - RGB lighting, red switches. Great for gaming or work.

Hi Kai! That Corsair keyboard sounds amazing—red switches and RGB lighting! I'm definitely interested. I can offer $35 for it. I know that's below your asking price, but I'd love to find a way to make this work. What do you think?

Thanks for the interest, Zoe! $35 is unfortunately too low for me. I can meet you at $50, which is the lowest I can go for this keyboard. It's a high-quality Corsair with excellent tactile feedback and customizable RGB. What do you say?
